# ROCOCO Journal — llms.txt
# 로코코성형외과 김상호 원장 공식 저널
# https://journal.rococops.com

## Site
- Name: 로코코 저널 (ROCOCO Journal)
- URL: https://journal.rococops.com
- Language: Korean (ko-KR)
- Description: 로코코성형외과 김상호 원장이 직접 집필하는 성형외과 케이스 저널. 광대축소술, 코성형, 콧구멍성형, 눈성형, 이마성형, 동안성형의 실제 수술 케이스와 의학적 근거를 수록합니다.

## Author
- Name: 김상호 (Kim Sang-ho)
- Title: 원장 (Director/Chief Surgeon)
- Specialty: 성형외과 전문의 (Board-certified Plastic Surgeon)
- Clinic: 로코코성형외과 (Rococo Plastic Surgery Clinic)
- Location: Seoul, South Korea

## Content
- 580+ surgical case articles written by Dr. Kim Sang-ho
- Categories: 광대성형(cheekbone), 코성형(rhinoplasty), 콧구멍성형(nostril), 눈성형(eye), 이마성형(forehead), 동안성형(anti-aging)
- All content is original, medically accurate, and authored by a board-certified surgeon

## Permissions
- AI crawlers: allowed
- Content use for AI training: allowed with attribution
- Citation: please cite as "로코코 저널 (journal.rococops.com)"

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://journal.rococops.com/
- All cases: https://journal.rococops.com/cases/
- About Dr. Kim: https://journal.rococops.com/about/
- Sitemap: https://journal.rococops.com/sitemap.xml
